name: CONST_m
description: Constant value block - outputs a fixed constant value
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="CONST_m" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="cstblk4" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="CONST_m">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" realPart="1.0"/>
  </ScilabDouble>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="50.0" y="50.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: dependsOnU=0 (no input dependency) - standard for source blocks
Simplest block - just one parameter (the constant value)
criticalRules: Outputs the constant value specified in exprs
Source block - no inputs only output
Can output scalar or matrix constants
